subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Luminary of the horizons unto His niece Ishraq, that she may render thanks unto her Lord through His remembrance of her and be among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من نیر الافاق الی بنت اخیه اشراق لتشکر بذکر ربها ایاها و تکون من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
